channel.title: Tutorial on A minimal Hugo website
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorial on A minimal Hugo website

item.title: Hello World!
item.description:
Hello World!

This is a test blog post.

# here is test code
import os
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

LaTeX

Here is an example of inline LaTeX: $E = mc^2$.

Test for display math: $${\sqrt {n}}\left(\left({\frac {1}{n}}\sum _{i=1}^{n}X_{i}\right)-\mu \right)\ {\xrightarrow {d}}\ N\left(0,\sigma ^{2}\right)$$

item.title: Another Note on A blogdown Tutorial
item.description: I just discovered an awesome tutorial on blogdown written by Alison. I have to admit this is the best blogdown tutorial I have seen so far.
